results.title: Pretend I'm Still Here
results.overview: Haunted by the disappearance of a close friend, Mike turns to filmmaking to make sense of the past. But as production unfolds, Mike realises he might just be chasing an ending that doesn't exist.

results.title: I’m Still Here: A Dog’s Purpose Forever
results.original_title: I’m Still Here: A Dog’s Purpose Forever
results.overview: A poetically artistic rendering of Michon’s spiritual, uplifting book by the same name, reminding us that when our dogs die they never leave us.
